summary: Dan Shapiro shares a live, world-writable Google Spreadsheet where he's taking notes on startup pitches from Techstars Demo Day 2012. He invites readers to follow along in real-time and contribute questions and comments. This is a repeat of a format he previously used for Y Combinator Demo Day.
key_points: Shapiro uses a collaborative, world-writable spreadsheet to live-document startup demo day pitches
The format was previously tested at Y Combinator Demo Day, suggesting it worked well enough to repeat
He invites real-time audience participation through the shared document
money_quotes: I'm running a live, world-writable spreadsheet of my notes on the pitches from Techstars demo day 2012.
key_insight: A brief logistical post inviting readers to follow along with live collaborative notes on Techstars Demo Day 2012 pitches.
